title: physaria pueblensis
intro: Physaria pueblensis, also known as Puebla bladderpod, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It is native to Mexico and has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Physaria pueblensis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
